queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Analyze the empirical relationship between having no checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Assess the contribution of present employment duration less than one year to elevated credit default risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Evaluate statistical evidence regarding checking account balances below zero and credit risk mitigation.
